objections_faced.customer_quote: Sir, I am not interested in any plan right now aur main abhi office mein hoon toh utna main entertain kar nahi paunga.
objections_faced.agent_response_summary: Acknowledged the customer's busy status and requested a callback time.

call_end.end_reason_evidence:
Agent: Okay. Toh 11 baje main aapko call kar leta hoon Saturday ko, okay?
Customer: Theek hai, haan.

improvement_areas: Respecting customer boundaries when they express being busy.
coaching_recommendations: When a customer states they are busy at work, acknowledge it immediately and offer to call back without attempting to continue the pitch.
Avoid pushing for more information once the customer has clearly stated they are not interested or busy.
exemplary_quotes: Aap jab bhi free honge main aapko call kar loonga. Aap mujhe free ek timing bata dijiye, main aapko is time pe call kar loonga aur aapse baat kar loonga.
problematic_quotes: Main disturb nahi karna chahunga but main is plan ke bare mein aapko information dena chahunga.
profile.summary: The agent introduced themselves and the company clearly. When the customer stated they were busy and not interested, the agent persisted slightly before successfully pivoting to scheduling a callback for Saturday at 11 AM. The call ended professionally with a clear commitment for the follow-up.
